issue.desc: First official beta release
When opening while typing on a job, apply smart indent.
Convert encoding to add reopening capability.
[FIX] Small tool buttons, job characters, etc. on the high DPI display.
Job Edit Find/Replace/Go to Lines functionality added.
issue.mod_help: 3.3.5. Find, Replace, and Go To Lines

issue.desc: Added constructor to the syntax highlighter.
Deploy as installer.
Added robot language syntax check function.
Added Controller History Monitoring feature.
Add a show/hide menu for each window to the Window menu.
[FIX] Alarm help file load function missed.
Add Korean U/I and Language Change Functions.
issue.mod_help: 1.3. Configuration of the User Interface for HRWorkBench

issue.desc: Added English manual.
[FIX] 'new job file' does not working when there is no jobs/ path.
[FIX] Some Korean U/I in some dialog-box.
[FIX] Specifies some dialog-boxes' parent to main widget.
Append 'input' command to syntax highlight.
[FIX] smart indent : mis-indent after single if.
improve syntax highlighter : 1) true/false, pre-position, 신규 명령어 추가, 2) lighten up the darkblue-color a little.
support open api v3, v5 together
Added remote path for alarm help (Old: help/, New: /ata0:2/repo/release/tp/help/)
When click event-log update button, 'Alarm help is not ready.' message shown, if needed.
Added local (PC path) log/ view feature.
Added aux.(auxiliary) info. view feature on event log panel.
Added scope log viewer.
Built-in alarm help; Temporarily deactivate the feature loading helps from remote.
[FIX] If the home path is not specified, the scope log is not opened.
[FIX] Local log is not loaded when specifying the Korean path to home path.
[FIX] Fault occurs when specifying a home path and then another empty home path.
Change the variable monitoring window from tree to table (same specification as TP).
Add vars/ to Explorer, remove globals node
Main Menu - Edit, Variable added.
Add new command statements to Syntax Highlights. [FIX] bracket-related malfunctions.
Now, when displaying the step/func number on the status bar at the bottom, commented step is also considered as step.
[FIX] Replace not applied when Find/Replace a string contains symbols in all documents in the project.
[FIX] Abnormal behavior when select multiple rows in the global variable window and rename.
[FIX] Setting value in global variable window doesn't appled to its file.
Also read the newly created log files evlog_noti_??.txt and evlog_stst??.txt.
[FIX] Scope log's type-specific casting is mishandled.
[FIX] Scope log's marker timestamp is misinterpreted as local time.
[FIX] After reconnecting the monitoring, the alarm help is in an unprepared state, so log monitoring doesn't work.
Added Find Event feature on the Event Log window.
PC path can be set with the pop-up menu 'Set PC backup path' on the PC node.
[FIX] Fault occurs when the eid of log events exceeds the int range.
[FIX] Python error histories are not displayed in the log window.
[FIX] Rename operation doesn't work in the variable window.
The timestamp in the event history window has been improved from msec to usec (supported from Hi6 V60.26-00).
The update speed has been improved when repeatedly toggling the event log's category filter.
Program counter is also displayed in the notice/history/operation rows in the event log window (supported from Hi6V60.26-00).
Current selection of an event row maintained, even when the filter in the event log changed.
Add EDR_LOG/, EC_LOG/, cifX/, apps/ as backup items.
[FIX] Size-cursor doesn't appear in the border of the pane border.
Alarm help is updated based on Hi6 V60.30-00.
[FIX] The S/F number at the bottom of the Job window occasionally displayed garbage values.
Added a feature to adjust the font size in the Job editor using Ctrl + mouse wheel.
Updated alarm help based on Hi6 V60.30-06.
Added property porting feature.
[FIX] A fault occurs, when searching for a non-existent name in the .json tree view without selecting a tree node.
Added an error message for .json file parsing failures.
Added a feature to display the target step of the move statement in the event history log as aux. data. (Supported from Hi6 V60.32-00)
[FIX] Optimizing font and icon sizes for non-100% display scaling.
[FIX] Execution logs incorrectly recorded as ?{ 'pc': 'T19823/0/4' } were not being displayed.
[FIX] Doesn't navigate to the corresponding job location when double-clicking program counter field in the Event Log window.
Event log window - Added support for copying text from individual cells or entire rows.
Event log window - Added update button, progress-bar.
Help - Added check latest version dialog.
[FIX] Future event history is not displayed.
Pose information in the history window's auxiliary information is occasionally displayed incorrectly.
